reasoning: The initial estimates for Q1 and Q2 US GDP in 2025 were released in April and July respectively. The Q3 initial estimate is routinely released at the end of October. The fact that the market was at a 2% probability on October 30, 2025 strongly indicates that the initial estimates for Q1 and Q2 were not consecutive negatives, and that the Q3 initial estimate (which was already published by Oct 30) was positive. Since the resolution criteria strictly require two consecutive quarters in 2025 (meaning Q1-Q2, Q2-Q3, or Q3-Q4) using the initial estimates, a positive Q3 estimate mathematically eliminates the possibility of Q3 and Q4 both being negative. Therefore, by EOY 2025, there is virtually zero chance of this resolving to YES. I am aligning my forecast with the market estimate of 2%.
